title: Stage 1: HackWithInfy / Infytq Coding Rounds
desc: A competitive coding assessment testing advanced data structures, dynamic programming, and math.
tip: Practice topics like graphs, DP, backtracking, and mathematical logic.

title: Stage 2: Technical Interview
desc: Interviewers verify your coding solutions, and grill on database queries, OOP design, and web stack.
tip: Be prepared to dry run your code and explain alternative optimal solutions.

title: Stage 3: HR Interview
desc: Standard verification loop discussing career growth, relocation, and salary options.
tip: Maintain good communication and express long-term interest in technology consulting.
